payload.answer: I couldn't access the article at https://example.com/missing because the fetch failed with a 404/network error. I won't store claims about the article content without a valid source. You can provide the article text or a working URL if you want it remembered as useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable article facts can be safely stored.

details: No memory card was created because the source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Ask to remember only that you attempted to save this URL for memory architecture, without article content.
